body:
## Summary

Fixes #1304 - `--auto-restart-until-mergable` didn't work

The `--auto-restart-until-mergable` mode was incorrectly posting "✅ Ready to merge" when CI checks hadn't started yet. This is because the CI status check function returned `success` when there were zero checks (due to JavaScript's vacuous truth: `[].every(fn)` returns `true`).

### Root Cause

In `src/github-merge.lib.mjs`, the `checkPRCIStatus()` function had this logic:

```javascript
const allPassed = !hasPending && allChecks.every(c => 
  c.conclusion === 'success' || c.conclusion === 'skipped' || c.conclusion === 'neutral'
);
```

When `allChecks` is an empty array (CI hasn't started yet):
- `hasPending = [].some(...)` = `false`
- `allPassed = true && [].every(...)` = `true && true` = **`true`** ❌

### Timeline from the Bug

| Time (UTC) | Event |
|------------|-------|
| 13:32:15 | Commit pushed to PR #1298 |
| **13:32:28** | **"Ready to merge" posted** (WRONG) |
| 13:32:49 | CI check "Check for Changesets" started |
| 13:33:04 | CI check FAILED |

The "Ready to merge" message was posted 21 seconds BEFORE the CI check even started!

### Solution

Add an early return when `allChecks.length === 0` to treat missing checks as `pending` status, not `success`:

```javascript
if (allChecks.length === 0) {
  return {
    status: 'pending',
    checks: [],
    allPassed: false,
    hasPending: true,
  };
}
```

### Changes

- **`src/github-merge.lib.mjs`**: Return pending status for empty checks array
- **`tests/test-merge-queue.mjs`**: Add tests for Issue #1304 fix
- **`docs/case-studies/issue-1304/`**: Add comprehensive case study with:
  - Screenshot evidence
  - Solution draft logs
  - Timeline reconstruction
  - Root cause analysis
  - Online research references

### Test Plan

- [x] All existing tests pass (43 tests)
- [x] New tests verify Issue #1304 fix behavior
- [x] Lint passes

### Related Research

- [GitHub Docs: Troubleshooting required status checks](https://docs.github.com/en/pull-requests/collaborating-with-pull-requests/collaborating-on-repositories-with-code-quality-features/troubleshooting-required-status-checks)
- [Wait For Github Status Check Action](https://github.com/marketplace/actions/wait-for-github-status-check)
- [GitHub CLI: gh run watch](https://cli.github.com/manual/gh_run_watch) - notes that "the run may not yet have started due to a noticeable delay"

---

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: Fix --auto-restart-until-mergable false positive on empty CI checks
